issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but the effect describes a passive cost reduction, not an activated ability. This should likely be 'Trigger' or represent a static effect, not an action-based trigger.

Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but card text says 'Give blue Events in your hand −1 cost'. This should be a cost reduction mechanic (PowerBoost with negative value or similar cost modifier), not trashing cards.

The [Banish] effect is completely missing from the DSL. This passive effect (When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger) must be represented as a separate effect triggered OnAttack or OnDealDamage.
Condition requires HasRestingDon count 1, but card text states '[DON!! x1]' which typically means the cost/requirement is 1 DON, not a condition for the effect itself.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Banish] (When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger.)
[DON!! x1] Give blue Events in your hand −1 cost.

actions.description: Banish: target card trashed without activating Trigger
Blue Events in hand gain −1 cost
